table_cells.text: Proteus™ by Membrane Technology & Research Inc. is a proprietary commercial membrane offering a H2/CO2 selectivity of approximately 11 with a H2 permeance of 500 GPU (1 GPU = 10−6 cm3 (STP) cm−2 s−1 cmHg−1) at 150 °C mixed-gas operation
